direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
- **Concept:** Person wearing DuberyMNL sunglasses close-up on the left/foreground, with 2-3 floating product shots arranged on the right — neutral textured background, clean editorial feel. No heavy text, just logo + possibly a short brand line.
- **DuberyMNL swap-in:** Person wearing **outback-black**, floating product shots using other models from the lineup (e.g. Bandits, Rasta) — all replaced with DuberyMNL prodrefs. DuberyMNL logo and font applied.
- **Routing:** This is a **brand-collection** layout variant (person anchor + product array) — will build a custom prompt using the concept image as a reference alongside DuberyMNL prodrefs. Aspect ratio 4:5.

Hit Generate when ready.
change ratio to 16:9
- **Same concept:** Person wearing outback-black close-up on the left, 2-3 floating DuberyMNL product shots on the right, neutral textured background, logo applied.
- **Only change:** Aspect ratio updated to **16:9** (landscape) — layout stays the same, wider canvas gives more breathing room for the product array on the right.
- **Everything else held:** outback-black as the worn product, brand-collection routing, DuberyMNL fonts + logo, no heavy text overlays.

Hit Generate when ready.
